project_type: Python trading bot - CCT Rectangle scalping strategy with backtesting
test_framework: Built-in backtest verification (no unit test framework needed - results-based validation)
verification_instructions: Run python main.py and verify it produces trade results with entries, exits, RR ratios, and win rate statistics
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install packages and fetch market data from yfinance/other APIs. Python 3.9 available.
contribution_requirements: Completely standalone project - no references to any existing repo code
key_patterns: Greenfield project - modular design with separate files for data fetching, strategy logic, backtesting engine, and results output
directory_structure: CCT_Rectangle_Bot/ - standalone directory at repo root containing all bot code. Modular: config.py (settings), data_loader.py (fetch OHLC data), strategy.py (CCT Rectangle logic), backtester.py (engine), utils.py (helpers), main.py (entry point)
